debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

proof:
rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with h_lt | h_gt
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_lt
  · exact (offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_gt).congr
      (Filter.Eventually.of_forall (fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j))
successful_attempts:
rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with h_lt | h_gt
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_lt
  · exact (offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_gt).congr
      (Filter.Eventually.of_forall (fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j))
